title: [Update 0.13.2]
raw_body: Hey hey! Hopefully database stuff are fixed.. (please be fixed) Fixes/Improvements - Fixed some issues with database integration - Set Crafting and Refine cooldown 0.7s > 0.1s - Fix healing not working against undead enemies - Fix cooldown recovery stat - Improve summon behaviour Balance Changes - Execute Axe: Cooldown -1 > -2, Damage 35% > 15%, Exclusive - Chaos Reaver: Dark Claw Damage 35% > 15% - Eclipse Kunai: Black Blade cooldown changed to Twist of Fate cooldown - Fuma Shuriken: Removed skill mods, Slots 1 > 2 - Razor Kunai: Moved skills mods here (Fan of Knives and Shuriken Fan mods) [Underground Cavern] - Stormfeather Kunai: Changed to melee substats - Red Maw / Flintlock / Serpent Fang: Slots 3 > 2
